---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A short, one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?

> Example: "When using local models via Ollama, there is no way to exclude a specific model from the routing pool without removing it from providers.json."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Include API changes, config fields, or behaviour changes if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've already tried or thought about.

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, prior art in other projects, or anything else that helps explain the request.
